additional_metadata.note: Second Vienna dbt Meetup, featuring dbt Labs CTO; FabCon edition.

events.agenda: 18.00 Registration; 18.30 Welcome; 18.35 Moving to dbt Cloud talk; 19.05 What's New from dbt talk; 19.20 Internal data ecosystem talk; 19.35 Microsoft Fabric + dbt talk; 20.05-21.00 Closing & Networking.
events.event_description: This dbt Meetup is an opportunity for the local Vienna dbt Community to casually connect and collaborate. If you work with data, this event is for you.
events.event_name: Second Vienna dbt Meetup with dbt Labs CTO: FabCon Edition (in person)
events.location: Sclable Business Solutions GmbH, Marc-Aurel-Straße 10-12, Vienna
events.raw_text:
Tue, Sep 16, 2025 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM CEST

18.35 Moving from Self-Managed dbt to dbt Cloud (Martin Finn-Sell, GoStudent)
19.05 What's New from dbt (Mark Porter, CTO @ dbt Labs)
19.20 Building Our Internal Data Ecosystem (Sümeyye Suri & Manfred Krieger, sclable)
19.35 Real-World Success & Roadmap Ahead: Microsoft Fabric + dbt (Charles Webb, Microsoft Fabric)

talks.description: GoStudent's move from self-managed dbt to dbt Cloud.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 18.35: Moving from Self-Managed dbt to dbt Cloud. Martin Finn-Sell - Senior Data Scientist @ GoStudent
talks.title: Moving from Self-Managed dbt to dbt Cloud

talks.description: The latest updates and news from dbt Labs, presented by the CTO.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 19.05: What's New from dbt. Mark Porter - CTO @ dbt Labs
talks.title: What's New from dbt

talks.description: How sclable built its internal data ecosystem, turning raw data into business insights.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 19.20: Building Our Internal Data Ecosystem: From Raw Data to Business Insights. Sümeyye Suri - Data Analyst @ sclable, Manfred Krieger - DevOps Specialist @ sclable
talks.speaker_title: Data Analyst, sclable; DevOps Specialist, sclable
talks.title: Building Our Internal Data Ecosystem: From Raw Data to Business Insights

talks.description: Real-world success stories and the roadmap ahead for accelerating analytics using Microsoft Fabric with dbt.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 19.35: Real-World Success & Roadmap Ahead: Accelerating Analytics with Microsoft Fabric + dbt. Charles Webb - Principal PM Manager - Microsoft Fabric
talks.title: Real-World Success & Roadmap Ahead: Accelerating Analytics with Microsoft Fabric + dbt

events.agenda: 17.30 Registration; 18.00 Welcome; 18.15 dbt Macros talk; 18.45 What's new from dbt talk; 19.00 Self-Serve Analytics talk; 19.30-20.30 Networking with Food & Drinks.
